name: 4 Pack Fidget Toys, Squishy Cube, Ice Cube Squishy for Anxiety & Stress Relief for Adults, Slow Rise Sensory Stress Balls, Classroom Prizes

【LIGHTWEIGHT AND PORTABLE】Our Fidget Toys are compact in size and lightweight, making them easy to carry in pockets, backpacks, or drawers.
